test.name: Record-extraction request should route to record-extraction, not research-plan
test.description: User says 'pull the key facts out of this death certificate I just found' — this is an extraction task, not a planning task. research-plan should NOT accept this. It should route the user to the record-extraction skill.

input.user_message: I just found Patrick Flynn's death certificate from 1908. Pull the key facts out of it and add them to the project.

negative.explanation: The user wants to extract facts from a found record. research-plan's description explicitly says 'Do NOT use when the user wants to analyze records already found (use record-extraction)'. The correct routing is to record-extraction.

judge_context: This is a NEGATIVE routing test. The user wants to EXTRACT facts from a found record, not create a research plan.
The correct action is to route to Skill('record-extraction'), not to write plan items.
If the skill writes any new plan items to research.json in response to this request, that is a routing error — score Correctness=1.
Acceptable responses: routing the user to record-extraction, or a one-line explanation that extracting facts from records is handled by record-extraction.
